nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 科迪勒拉山系
nodes.summary: 科迪勒拉山系是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Maroon-chested ground dove、Scale-crested pygmy tyrant、灰猫嘲鸫，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Maroon-chested ground dove
nodes.summary: Maroon-chested ground dove（Maroon-chested ground dove，学名 Paraclaravis mondetoura），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于科迪勒拉山系、次生林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is native to the American Cordillera of Central and South America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: inca, Peru and west central Bolivia The maroon-chested ground dove inhabits dense undergrowth in wet montane forest, its edges, and thickets of secondary forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: inca, Peru and west central Bolivia The maroon-chested ground dove inhabits dense undergrowth in wet montane forest, its edges, and thickets of secondary forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the maroon-chested ground dove as being of Least Concern. However, it is considered uncommon to rare, and is "[p]robably in danger of decline if heavy deforestation continues throughout its range."

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Maroon-chested ground dove 属于目 鸽形目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Maroon-chested ground dove 属于科 鸠鸽科。
